Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. RONALD RICHMAN, Esq. of Bullivant Houser Bailey PC (tel: 415-352-2700) for Plaintiff.
Atty. GREGRORY WOODARD, Esq. of Woodard Legal PC (tel: 949-878-6615) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL INTERPACK OF NORTH AMERICA, INC.

Matter discussed as to the trial date. Counsel Gregory Woodard requests a continuance. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court continues the matter to May 23, 2024, at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Continued To Apr-25-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. RONALD RICHMAN, Esq. of Bullivant Houser Bailey PC (tel: 415-352-2700) for Plaintiff.
Atty. GREGORY WOODWARD, Esq. Woodward Legal PC (tel: 949-878-6615) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ROYAL INTERPACK OF NORTH AMERICA, INC.'s MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Matter discussed as to whether new counsel has been retained by the defendant. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court continues the matter to April 25, 2024 at 9:30 A.M., to allow the defendant to retain counsel.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
